definition:
1. a belt  or girdle , worn round the waist beneath  the cuirass (whereas the ζωστήρ went over  it), (Iliad by Homer) 
2. = ζώνη, the maiden-zone , (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus), etc. 
3. a girdle worn by wrestlers , [variant datesAnthology Palantina 
4. a head-band  worn by Greek women to tie up their hair, a snood , (Euripides) 
5. the victor's chaplet  at the games, (Pindar); Λυδία μίτρα a Lydian garland  (i. e. an ode in Lydian measure), (Pindar) 
6. a Persian head-dress, turban , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
